name: getAlarmCollection
description: Get a collection of alarms based on filter parameters
descriptionLong: Get a collection of alarms based on filter parameters

queryParameters.name: source
queryParameters.description: Source device id.

queryParameters.name: dateFrom
queryParameters.description: Start date or date and time of alarm occurrence.

queryParameters.name: dateTo
queryParameters.description: End date or date and time of alarm occurrence.

queryParameters.name: type
queryParameters.description: Alarm type.

queryParameters.name: status
queryParameters.description: Comma separated alarm statuses, for example ACTIVE,CLEARED.

queryParameters.name: severity
queryParameters.description: Alarm severity, for example MINOR.

queryParameters.name: resolved
queryParameters.description: When set to true only resolved alarms will be removed (the one with status CLEARED), false means alarms with status ACTIVE or ACKNOWLEDGED.

queryParameters.name: withAssets
queryParameters.description: Include assets

queryParameters.name: withDevices
queryParameters.description: Include devices

body.name: source
body.description: The ManagedObject that the alarm originated from

body.name: type
body.description: Identifies the type of this alarm, e.g. 'com_cumulocity_events_TamperEvent'.

body.name: severity
body.description: The severity of the alarm: CRITICAL, MAJOR, MINOR or WARNING. Must be upper-case.

body.name: status
body.description: The status of the alarm: ACTIVE, ACKNOWLEDGED or CLEARED. If status was not appeared, new alarm will have status ACTIVE. Must be upper-case.

name: updateAlarmCollection
description: The PUT method allows for updating alarms collections. Currently only the status of alarms can be changed

body.name: newStatus
body.description: New status to be applied to all of the matching alarms

queryParameters.name: source
queryParameters.description: The ManagedObject that the alarm originated from

queryParameters.name: status
queryParameters.description: The status of the alarm: ACTIVE, ACKNOWLEDGED or CLEARED. If status was not appeared, new alarm will have status ACTIVE. Must be upper-case.

queryParameters.name: severity
queryParameters.description: The severity of the alarm: CRITICAL, MAJOR, MINOR or WARNING. Must be upper-case.

queryParameters.name: resolved
queryParameters.description: When set to true only resolved alarms will be removed (the one with status CLEARED), false means alarms with status ACTIVE or ACKNOWLEDGED.

queryParameters.name: dateFrom
queryParameters.description: Start date or date and time of alarm occurrence.

queryParameters.name: dateTo
queryParameters.description: End date or date and time of alarm occurrence.

body.name: status
body.description: Comma separated alarm statuses, for example ACTIVE,CLEARED.

queryParameters.name: source
queryParameters.description: Source device id.

queryParameters.name: dateFrom
queryParameters.description: Start date or date and time of alarm occurrence.

queryParameters.name: dateTo
queryParameters.description: End date or date and time of alarm occurrence.

queryParameters.name: type
queryParameters.description: Alarm type.

queryParameters.name: status
queryParameters.description: Comma separated alarm statuses, for example ACTIVE,CLEARED.

queryParameters.name: severity
queryParameters.description: Alarm severity, for example MINOR.

queryParameters.name: resolved
queryParameters.description: When set to true only resolved alarms will be removed (the one with status CLEARED), false means alarms with status ACTIVE or ACKNOWLEDGED.

queryParameters.name: withSourceAssets
queryParameters.description: When set to true also alarms for related source assets will be removed. When this parameter is provided also source must be defined.

queryParameters.name: withSourceDevices
queryParameters.description: When set to true also alarms for related source devices will be removed. When this parameter is provided also source must be defined.
